pageContext.name: GX-25R Garada K-7 and GX-26R Doubulas M-2
pageContext.description: Celebrating the fiftieth anniversary of the debut of Mazinger Z on television comes this two-pack of revised and renewed portrayals of the famed 'kikaiju' enemy robots Garada K-7 and Doublas M-2. Garada K-7's head-sickles and Doublas M-2's twisty necks have been revised to better capture their appearance from the anime.
